The '''Jaminere Marches''' was one of the feuding states that rose in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] from the ashes of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot's]] [[Xim's empire|empire]] in the century after his [[Death/Legends|death]]. It was centered on [[Jaminere/Legends|Jaminere]] and contained approximately the worlds of the future [[Allied Tion sector/Legends|Allied Tion sector]]. It joined the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] after the [[Tionese War]].<ref name="Xim Week" />
